span.t-attf-class: badge bg-#{ 'success' if order_status_value == 'shipped' else 'info' if order_status_value == 'prepared' else 'primary' if order_status_value == 'manufacturing' else 'warning' if order_status_value == 'warehouse' else 'secondary' }

badge bg-#{ 'success' if picking_status_value == 'done' else 'info' if picking_status_value == 'assigned' else 'warning' if picking_status_value == 'partially_available' else 'danger' if picking_status_value in ['not_created', 'waiting'] else 'secondary' }

tr.td: No hay productos agregados. Use el buscador arriba.

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-#{ 'success' if order.order_status == 'shipped' else 'info' if order.order_status == 'prepared' else 'primary' if order.order_status == 'manufacturing' else 'warning' if order.order_status == 'warehouse' else 'secondary' }

badge bg-#{ 'success' if order.picking_status == 'done' else 'info' if order.picking_status == 'assigned' else 'warning' if order.picking_status == 'partially_available' else 'danger' if order.picking_status in ['not_created', 'waiting'] else 'secondary' }

form.onsubmit: return confirm('¿Está seguro de cancelar este pedido?');
